Use the Arrow Keys or 'A' and 'D' to move the spotlight
Once the spotlight is on a character you like, click the thumbs up button on the right to select that character
Type in an answer to the question and click OK once you are done
Once you have answered, click the thumbs up button repeatedly until the spotlight shines at full brightness on the new star!
Keep up the good work and don't forget to keep liking!
